summary: The user and their partner are in the process of buying a new home, having found a place with large windows and a backyard after three months of searching. They are excited about decorating their living room and hosting outdoor gatherings, planning to take their time settling in before making major changes.
facts: The user and their partner have been renting a small apartment for years. The user and their partner are closing on their new home today. The user is looking forward to having a big backyard for hosting BBQs and outdoor gatherings with friends and family. The user plans to unpack essentials and set up utilities in the first few weeks after moving into their new home. The user is excited about having a backyard to enjoy nature without being surrounded by apartment buildings. The user and their partner started looking for a new home three months ago.
